name: Student Name
age_or_work_permit: I meet the age requirements for part-time work and can provide a work permit if needed.
work_eligibility: Authorized to work in the United States
short_intro: I am a responsible high school student looking for a part-time summer job where I can learn, help customers, and be dependable.

custom_answers.What does your ideal job look like?: My ideal job is part-time, has a supportive team, and gives me a chance to learn while helping customers.
custom_answers.When are you available to work?: I am available weekdays after 3 PM and on weekends.
custom_answers.Why do you want to work here?: I want to gain work experience, help customers, and be a dependable member of the team.
custom_answers.Tell us about your customer service expe: I enjoy helping people, listening carefully, and staying patient when solving problems.
custom_answers.Tell us about a time you worked on a tea: In school projects and activities, I try to communicate clearly, do my part, and help the group stay organized.
custom_answers.Anything else an employer should know?: I am dependable, willing to learn, and ready to work hard.
